items.title: Plugin system
items.description: A minimal plugin API for DSP effects and metadata providers. Distant future.

items.title: Parametric EQ
items.description: Replace the 10-band graphic EQ with a parametric EQ - more control per band, Q factor, shelf filters.

items.title: Crossfeed
items.description: Binaural crossfeed filter for headphone listening - reduces fatigue on hard-panned recordings.

items.title: Stereo widening
items.description: Mid/side processing for adjusting stereo width without clipping.

items.title: ReplayGain scanner
items.description: Built-in scanner to compute and write ReplayGain tags to files, not just read them.

items.title: Waveform seeker
items.description: A visual waveform of the audio file displayed as a seek bar, rather than a standard progress bar.

items.title: A-B loop
items.description: Set points A and B for a specific repeat section within a track.

items.title: Sleep timer
items.description: Automatically stop playback after a specified time.

items.title: Playback speed
items.description: Adjust the playback speed of audio files.

items.title: Restore position
items.description: Remember the last position of each track when the app is closed and reopened.

items.title: Tag editor
items.description: Edit ID3/Vorbis metadata (title, artist, album, year, genre, cover) directly from the UI.

items.title: Smart filter bar
items.description: Filter the library by genre, year, format, and bit depth without going into the settings.

items.title: Cover art fallback
items.description: Fetch the cover from MusicBrainz or the Cover Art Archive if the file doesn't have a cover.

items.title: Multi column sort
items.description: Sort by album, artist, and track number all at once, not just by a single field.

items.title: EQ presets
items.description: Save/load EQ settings as named presets. Includes several default presets (Rock, Classical, Vocal).

items.title: Stereo width
items.description: Mid/side balance control to widen or narrow the stereo image.

items.title: Loudness normalisation
items.description: EBU R128 / LUFS-based loudness normalization as an alternative to ReplayGain.

items.title: MusicBrainz lookup
items.description: Automatic metadata enrichment via MusicBrainz: genre, year, ISRC, label.

items.title: Track info modal
items.description: Track details: all tags, codec information, file path, ReplayGain values, play count.

items.title: Notification toast
items.description: A notification when a folder has finished scanning, a scrobble has failed, or an update is available.

items.title: System tray
items.description: Minimize to the system tray, a small control panel pops up from the tray icon without opening the full app.

items.title: Settings backup
items.description: Export or import all settings and playlists as a single JSON file.

items.title: Missing file detection
items.description: Detect tracks in the library whose files have been moved or deleted, then offer to remove or relocate them.

items.title: Android improvements
items.description: Improved notification controls, lock screen art, and scoped storage handling in Android 13 and later.
